purpose: Use this security audit result to plan additional remediation, verification, and follow-up work.

analyzed_targets: routing, API wrapper, CSV export, external link handling
assumptions: The reviewed repository is the frontend/admin dashboard layer.
Admin APIs are served by Supabase Edge Functions.
Server-side security cannot be considered verified until backend source or deployed configuration is reviewed.

score.calculation_note: 이 향상률은 검토된 파일과 발견된 이슈 기준의 추정치입니다.
score.deployment_assessment: Frontend changes are deployable, but production release should wait for Supabase backend security verification.

checklist_results.evidence: Frontend token flow exists, but server JWT validation, expiration, and refresh-token behavior were not verified.
Frontend sends Bearer tokens. Server-side admin authorization and RLS source were unavailable.
Query parameter construction and Kakao link validation were remediated; server DTO/schema validation remains unverified.
javascript: link risk was fixed. CSP/security headers and cookie/CSRF posture remain unverified.
CSV formula injection was remediated for reviewed exports. No upload/download server flow was verified.
A hardcoded admin password in a verification script was removed. Runtime secret rotation and deployed env review remain required.
No custom frontend crypto found. JWT signing/key handling could not be verified without backend source.
npm audit --audit-level=moderate finished with 0 vulnerabilities after dependency updates.
Frontend public errors are generic enough in reviewed flows. Server logging and secret redaction were not verified.
Frontend query construction was hardened. Server-side ownership, admin role, pagination, and mutation validation remain unverified.

issues.title: Hardcoded admin password in verification script
issues.impact: Repository access could expose an admin credential and enable unauthorized dashboard login.
issues.root_cause: A verification script stored the admin password as a string literal.
issues.abuse_path: Read repository or script artifact, reuse credential against the admin login endpoint.
remediation_applied: Added a fail-fast error when ADMIN_PASSWORD is missing.
Added static regression test to prevent reintroducing const PASSWORD = '...'.
issues.remaining_risk: If the hardcoded value was ever shared or committed externally, rotate the real admin password/secret out of band.

issues.title: Unsafe Kakao link href could allow javascript: URL execution
issues.impact: A malicious stored link could run script in an admin browser if clicked.
issues.root_cause: application.kakao_link was rendered as an anchor href without scheme or host validation.
issues.abuse_path: Save a javascript: or hostile URL as kakao_link, wait for an admin to click 상담 연결.
remediation_applied: Disabled saving and rendering for invalid stored links.
issues.remaining_risk: Server should also validate kakao_link because frontend validation can be bypassed.

issues.title: Known high severity dependency vulnerabilities
issues.impact: Reported advisories included XSS, file read/dev server issues, DoS, and other package-specific risks.
issues.root_cause: react-router, vite, and transitive undici were below patched versions.
remediation_applied: Updated transitive undici to 7.28.0 via npm audit fix.
issues.remaining_risk: Add dependency audit to CI so regressions fail before merge.

issues.title: CSV formula injection in exported admin data
issues.impact: Spreadsheet apps could treat exported cells beginning with =, +, -, @, or leading control characters as formulas.
issues.root_cause: CSV exports escaped commas and quotes but did not neutralize spreadsheet formulas.
issues.abuse_path: Applicant/course data begins with a formula-like payload, admin exports CSV, spreadsheet evaluates the formula.
remediation_applied: Added escapeCsvCell with formula prefix detection.
Reused escapeCsvCell for revenue comparison CSV and course applicant CSV.
issues.remaining_risk: Search future export features and require the same helper.

issues.title: Query parameter pollution risk in API wrapper
issues.impact: Unencoded IDs could be interpreted as additional query parameters by backend endpoints.
issues.root_cause: applicationId was interpolated directly into query strings.
issues.abuse_path: An ID containing '&limit=...' or similar changes backend query semantics if accepted upstream.
issues.remaining_risk: Server endpoints must still validate ID format and enforce authorization.

issues.title: Server-side security controls not verifiable from this repository
issues.impact: Frontend hardening cannot prove JWT, RLS, rate limit, CORS, or business authorization are safe.
issues.root_cause: Supabase function and DB policy sources are not present in the reviewed repo.
recommended_remediation: Review or import Supabase function source.
Verify JWT signature, expiration, refresh, logout invalidation, and admin claims.
Verify RLS blocks anon/client direct access to admin data.
Verify all mutations validate fields server-side.
Add rate limiting for login and high-risk admin endpoints.
Configure CSP, frame-ancestors, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and HSTS at hosting layer.
tests_to_add: Non-admin token cannot access admin endpoints.
Direct anon Supabase table reads are denied.

changes: Added static regression test for hardcoded admin password pattern
Blocked invalid saved links and invalid new inputs
Added javascript: URL and hostile host regression tests
Added CSV formula injection regression tests
Switched vulnerable query string interpolation to URLSearchParams
Added query encoding and NaN course_id regression tests
Locked patched react-router, vite, and undici versions

commands.details: vite build completed. Warning: some chunks are larger than 500 kB after minification.
No whitespace errors. Git reported CRLF conversion warnings only.

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Verify Supabase backend security source/config
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: The remaining highest uncertainty is server-side auth, authorization, RLS, rate limiting, and CORS.
expected_outputs: Backend security checklist with file references
List of missing controls
Server-side tests for unauthorized and invalid-token requests

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Add server-side validation for kakao_link and all admin mutations
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: Frontend validation can be bypassed by direct API calls.
expected_outputs: Schema validation for admin PATCH/POST endpoints
Reject non-https or non-open.kakao.com kakao_link values
Reject unknown fields and invalid enum values

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Add login and admin endpoint rate limiting tests
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: Password-only admin login needs brute-force resistance.
expected_outputs: Rate-limit policy documented
Tests for repeated login failures
Generic login error responses

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Configure production security headers
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: The frontend has no verified CSP, frame-ancestors, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, or Permissions-Policy.
expected_outputs: Hosting-specific headers config
CSP allowing only required app/Supabase endpoints
Regression check for headers

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Review token storage strategy
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: JWT is stored in sessionStorage, which is vulnerable to theft if any XSS occurs.
expected_outputs: Decision record comparing sessionStorage vs HttpOnly Secure cookie session
Migration plan if backend supports cookie sessions
Shorter token lifetime or refresh invalidation hardening if keeping current model

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Add CI security gates
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: Dependency and secret regressions should fail before merge.
expected_outputs: CI command for npm test/typecheck/build/audit
Secret scanning rule for obvious admin credential literals
Documented local pre-release checklist

recommended_next_work_for_claude.title: Clean up generated or verification artifacts
recommended_next_work_for_claude.reason: Scripts and generated outputs can accidentally preserve sensitive state.
expected_outputs: Confirm screenshots/logs do not contain secrets
Ensure verification artifacts are gitignored when appropriate
Document how to run verify-badges.mjs using ADMIN_PASSWORD

important_notes: Do not print or commit real secret values.
If the previous hardcoded admin credential was real and exposed outside the local workspace, rotate it before production use.
Frontend controls are defense-in-depth only; admin APIs must enforce all authorization and validation server-side.
현재 확인한 범위에서는 frontend-level critical issues were remediated, but actual production deployment requires separate backend and secret review.
